summary: Smoother ⇧⌘V clipboard picker navigation with a glass paste confirmation toast.

introduced: After selecting a clip, a brief glass-style toast shows what was copied to the clipboard
changed: ⇧⌘V picker uses ↑↓ to browse full history or search results with auto-scroll
Typing any character (except Esc) immediately filters clips in Search clips…
Return keeps the selected row highlighted for one second before closing
